Very good service

reviews.comment:
Que lastima que en una estacion tan bonita tardes 40 minutos para llenar el tanque. De tres islas solo una habilitada. La organizacion un desastre, te hacen hacer fila a 30 metros de la isla y tenes que estar controlando que no se meta nadie.

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that at such a nice station it takes 40 minutes to fill up. Only one of the three pump islands is open. The organization is a disaster; they make you line up 30 meters from the island and you have to keep an eye on things to make sure no one cuts in line.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXdTdPdC1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Con rapidez y educación.

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Lo malo es que siempre hay mucha cola, sobre todo en temporada.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The downside is that there's always a long queue, especially during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcTVtNnZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Domingo lleno de autos, y el playero cerro dos surtidores para baldear el piso, nunca visto, pésima organización de un turno. Un solo surtidor despachando, media pila.

(Translated by Google)
Sunday was packed with cars, and the attendant closed two pumps to wash the floor—unheard of! Terrible shift organization. Only one pump working, half-assed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXODktemFREAE

reviews.comment:
Tendrían q poner algúna señal de que la fila arranca por la calle y no ingresando a la estacion

(Translated by Google)
They should put up some sign indicating that the queue starts on the street and not inside the station.
